nodes.name: Mock Demand Signals
nodes.notes: Stands in for a live /signals endpoint or a published Google Sheet. NO personal data — procurement facts only. Edit these values to test the gate (e.g. drop unit_price below the cap, or push net_need down).

nodes.name: Claude — Advise (AI)
nodes.notes: The AI step. Returns confidence/decision/rationale ONLY. Needs an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var (or paste a key). The model is structurally forbidden from outputting supplier/qty/price.

nodes.name: Deterministic Gate (no AI)
nodes.notes: This is the heart of the POC: the AI advised; this code DECIDES. Quantity = net_need/MOQ math; price = contract; verdict from spend cap + confidence floor + decision. Fails closed if the AI response is unparseable.

nodes.name: Auto-place?
nodes.notes: Routes the decision. TRUE = AI cleared the gate -> auto-place a requisition. FALSE = stage/escalate -> a human approves.

nodes.name: AUTO-PLACE → POST requisition
nodes.notes: In production: HTTP POST to /api/v1/requisitions/manual, or append a row to a 'POs to place' sheet. (NoOp here so the POC runs without a backend.)

nodes.name: STAGE/ESCALATE → notify buyer
nodes.notes: In production: send the buyer an email/Slack with the proposal + the AI's rationale + a one-click approve link. (NoOp here.)
